ba_output.title: Hair Salon Appointment Management System Requirements Document

assumptions.description: The system will be built using a web-based architecture.

constraints.description: The system must comply with all applicable laws and regulations.

out_of_scope.description: The design and implementation of the system's user interface.

user_stories.description: As a salon owner, I want to manage my staff's access levels and permissions so that I can maintain system security and ensure my staff can access the necessary features to do their job.
As a client, I want to be able to book and manage my appointments online so that I can easily schedule and track my appointments.
As a stylist, I want to be able to view and manage my schedule so that I can accurately plan my work and ensure I have enough time for each appointment.

functional_requirements.description: System to manage types of appointments
System to support multiple locations
Staff access levels
Online booking and tracking for clients
Basic data protection and security

assumptions.description: The app will be developed using a web and mobile framework (e.g. React Native, Angular)
The app will integrate with a cloud storage provider (e.g. AWS S3, Google Cloud Storage)

constraints.description: Web and mobile application support is mandatory
Cloud storage limits must be taken into account when designing the app's architecture

user_stories.description: As a citizen, I want to register and log in to the app to access news and features
As a media house, I want to publish news articles and updates to the app without requiring manual moderation
As an admin, I want to moderate and approve news articles before they are published to the app
As a citizen, I want to easily find and read news articles, including event listings, crime alerts, and weather updates

functional_requirements.description: User registration and authentication for citizens, media houses, and admins
News publication and moderation features for media houses and admins
Event listings, crime alerts, and weather updates features for citizens and media houses
Single city coverage with option to expand to nearby cities
Web and mobile application support
Cloud storage for news articles, user data, and other app-related data

non_functional_requirements.description: Security: User authentication and authorization, data encryption
Usability: Intuitive user interface, easy news publication and moderation
Performance: Fast loading times, seamless user experience
Scalability: Ability to handle increased user traffic and new city additions

user_stories.Description: As a user, I want to be able to differentiate between databases based on color to make it easier to understand and analyze the data
As a user, I want to be able to configure the color scheme for each database without affecting other databases
As a user, I want to be able to view the data from each database with its corresponding color scheme

functional_requirements.Description: User should be able to select multiple databases to connect to the dashboard
The dashboard should be able to retrieve data from the connected databases in real-time
User should be able to create custom dashboards with various data visualizations
The dashboard should allow user to save and load custom dashboard layouts
User should be able to filter and sort data for each connected database
User should be able to select different color scheme for each connected database
The dashboard should display data from each connected database with a unique color scheme

user_stories.Title: As a staff member, I want to be able to log in to the system so that I can access my schedules and client information
As a client, I want to be able to check my upcoming appointments and make payments online so that I can plan my schedule
As an administrator, I want to be able to manage staff attendance and payroll so that I can ensure accurate and timely payment
As a salon owner, I want to be able to track sales and client demographics so that I can make informed business decisions
As a staff member, I want to be able to request time off and view my leave calendar so that I can plan my schedule

functional_requirements.Description: User registration and login functionality for staff and administrators
Client management system for storing client details, upcoming appointments, and payment history
Scheduling and appointment management system for booking, rescheduling, and cancellations
Inventory management system for tracking stock levels of hair care products and other salon supplies
Attendance and payroll management system for tracking staff attendance and calculating salaries
Financial management system for handling transactions, generating invoices, and managing payment gateways
Reports and analytics system for generating reports on sales, client demographics, and staff performance

non_functional_requirements.Description: System should be secure and adhere to GDPR and other relevant data protection regulations
System should be user-friendly and intuitive for both staff and administrators
System should be scalable and able to handle high traffic and large data volumes
System should be accessible on multiple devices and platforms including desktop, tablet, and mobile

ba_output.title: Updated Dog Breed Suggestions Based on Personality with OTP Login

assumptions.description: Users will receive OTPs through their registered email addresses or mobile numbers
Users will have a basic understanding of dog behavior and needs
Users will have a user-friendly interface to interact with the system
Users will have a stable internet connection to access the system

constraints.description: The system will not recommend dog breeds that are not suitable for the user's lifestyle and preferences
The system will not recommend dog breeds that are not available in the user's location
User sessions with invalid or expired OTPs will be terminated during login
The system will not store user OTPs for long-term use

out_of_scope.description: The system will not provide personalized advice on dog training and behavior modification
The system will not integrate with veterinary services or other pet-related businesses
The system will not provide user authentication through social media accounts

user_stories.user_story: As a busy professional, I want to log in to my account using an OTP to quickly access my dog breed recommendations
As a family with young children, we want to log in to our account using an OTP so that we can easily find dog breeds suitable for our family
As a runner, I want to log in to my account using an OTP so that I can save time and quickly access dog breeds for active lifestyles

functional_requirements.title: OTP Generation
functional_requirements.description: Generate a one-time password (OTP) for users to authenticate their accounts

functional_requirements.title: Modified OTP Generation for Login
functional_requirements.description: Generate a one-time password (OTP) for users to log in to their accounts

functional_requirements.title: Modified OTP Verification for Login
functional_requirements.description: Verify user's OTP to log in to their accounts

functional_requirements.title: User Profile Creation
functional_requirements.description: User input for lifestyle, home type, experience level, and preferences

functional_requirements.title: OTP Verification
functional_requirements.description: Verify user's OTP to authenticate their accounts

functional_requirements.title: Modified OTP Verification for Login
functional_requirements.description: Verify user's OTP to log in to their accounts

functional_requirements.title: User Input Validation
functional_requirements.description: Validate user input to ensure completeness and accuracy

functional_requirements.title: Algorithm Development
functional_requirements.description: Develop a decision-making algorithm that considers user's priorities, lifestyle, and preferences

functional_requirements.title: Recommendation Generation
functional_requirements.description: Generate a list of dog breed suggestions based on the user's profile and algorithm output

functional_requirements.title: User Interface Design
functional_requirements.description: Design an intuitive user interface to display recommended dog breeds and provide additional information

functional_requirements.title: Output Display
functional_requirements.description: Display recommended dog breeds with their corresponding characteristics, such as energy level, friendliness, etc.

functional_requirements.title: Modified User Authentication
functional_requirements.description: Verify user's OTP and credentials to log in to their accounts

functional_requirements.title: Personalized Messages
functional_requirements.description: Provide personalized messages to users based on their personality traits, preferences, and lifestyle

non_functional_requirements.title: User Experience
non_functional_requirements.description: Ensure a user-friendly interface with clear and concise language

non_functional_requirements.title: Data Security
non_functional_requirements.description: Ensure that user data is collected and stored securely

non_functional_requirements.title: Scalability
non_functional_requirements.description: Ensure that the system can handle a large volume of user requests and traffic

non_functional_requirements.title: Accessibility
non_functional_requirements.description: Ensure that the system is accessible to users with disabilities

non_functional_requirements.title: Integration
non_functional_requirements.description: Integrate the system with external data sources, such as dog breed databases

non_functional_requirements.title: OTP Security
non_functional_requirements.description: Ensure that OTPs are securely generated, verified, and stored

non_functional_requirements.title: Authentication Failure Handling
related_to: Modify Authentication Failure Handling for Login
non_functional_requirements.description: Handle user authentication failures due to incorrect OTPs or expired OTPs

non_functional_requirements.title: Modify Authentication Failure Handling for Login
non_functional_requirements.description: Handle user authentication failures due to incorrect OTPs or expired OTPs during login
